Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the IGCAR Trade Apprentice Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 20 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the DV Date for IGCAR Trade Apprentice 2026?
As per schedule, the DV date for IGCAR Trade Apprentice 2026.
Q3. Where can I find the Selection Procedure for the IGCAR Trade Apprentice Examination?
The detailed Selection Proecredure are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the IGCAR Trade Apprentice Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for IGCAR Trade Apprentice 2026?
The last date to apply online is 19 August 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
No Application Fees
Q7. How can I apply for IGCAR Trade Apprentice 2026?
IGCAR Trade Apprentice Online Form 2026 .

Indira Gandhi Centre for Atomic Research (IGCAR) has released the notification for the recruitment of Apprentice Exam 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following IGCAR Apprentice Online Form 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 20/07/2026 to 19/08/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in IGCAR Apprentice Recruitment 2026.
